summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V1 LOCKED requirements for Fractal Platform. All backend APIs pass (20/20 tests), all frontend pages load correctly with proper data visualization for SPX, BTC, and DXY assets.

issues: WebSocket connection repeatedly failing (WS_ENABLED=false) - causes console spam but doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: V1 Audit: All individual checks pass (history_start, anchor_lock, btc_crossasset, forecast_length)
GET /api/ui/overview?asset=spx - Returns correct SPX data (actual=494, predicted=91)
GET /api/ui/overview?asset=btc - Returns correct BTC data (actual=61, predicted=90)
GET /api/ui/overview?asset=dxy - Returns correct DXY data (actual=35, predicted=81)
SPX overview has verdict with stance in [BULLISH, BEARISH, HOLD]
BTC crossAsset snapshot exists (V1 LOCKED requirement)
DXY values in correct range (80-150, not SPX 5000+ range)
History start dates correct: BTC=2026-01-01, SPX=2026-01-02, DXY=2026-01-02
Anchor lock verified for all assets (anchorDate matches asOfDate)
GET /api/health - Returns ok status with ts_backend active
Frontend BTC Fractal page (/) - NEUTRAL stance, Expected Outcomes, Risk analysis
Frontend SPX page (/fractal/spx) - BULLISH SPX +2.41% with Hybrid/Cross-Asset modes
Frontend DXY page (/dxy) - BEARISH USD -5.77% with Macro overlay
Frontend Overview page - Asset tabs (S&P 500, Bitcoin, Dollar), horizon selectors working
Frontend Overview BTC - Shows BULLISH 90% with proper chart
Frontend Overview DXY - Shows BEARISH 50% with correct DXY range values
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket connection failing repeatedly - WS_ENABLED=false but frontend still attempts connections. Consider disabling WS client in frontend when not needed to reduce console noise.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V1 LOCKED requirements verified: BTC crossAsset snapshots exist, history starts from 2026-01-01, anchor lock working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_v1_locked_overview.py covers all V1 audit checks.

v1_locked_status.history_start_2026_01_01: PASS - BTC starts 2026-01-01, SPX/DXY start 2026-01-02 (market holiday)
v1_locked_status.anchor_lock: PASS - anchorDate matches asOfDate for all assets
